uation (Weighted Scoring per KB-401)
| Vendor | Price(30%) | Delivery(25%) | Quality(20%) | Relation(15%) | Support(10%) | TOTAL | Notes |
|--------|------------|---------------|--------------|---------------|---------------|-------|-------|
| Lenovo | 80 | 85 | 85 | 60 | 80 | 79.25 | Recommended |
| Botong | 75 | 80 | 75 | 65 | 70 | 74.75 | Backup option |
| Xinchen | 85 | 60 | 80 | 55 | 75 | 73.50 | Xinchuang priority |
| Huaxinda | 70 | 75 | 50 | 90 | 70 | 70.50 | Quality concern |

## 5. Vendor History Analysis
- Cisco: Q4 2025 network equipment 350,000 CNY (satisfactory)
- Huaxinda: Q4 2025 Dell servers 680,000 CNY, 10% DOA rate, 68,000 CNY refund

## 6. Procurement Recommendations
{chr(10).join(recommendations)}

## 7. Compliance Notes
- Per KB-401: Single supplier ≤60% of total amount
- Per KB-401: New supplier first order ≤1,000,000 CNY
- Per KB-401: Orders >80% budget require additional justification
- No purchase orders placed - evaluation only per task requirement

---
Report Status: EVALUATION COMPLETE
Next Step: Submit to Sankin Kotai Check (or request budget increase)
"""
